## Which promise does this update?

Promise ID: <!-- e.g. #3 -->
Promise title: <!-- copy from the tracker -->

## What has changed?

<!-- Describe in plain language what happened. Be factual, not opinionated. -->

## New status (if changed)

- [ ] No status change — just adding information
- [ ] Pending → In Progress
- [ ] Pending → Fulfilled
- [ ] Pending → Evaded
- [ ] In Progress → Fulfilled
- [ ] In Progress → Evaded
- [ ] Other (explain below)

## Source

**URL:**
<!-- Must be a direct link. Social media posts are not accepted. -->

**Publication / document name:**

**Date of publication:**

**Source tier:**
- [ ] Tier 1 — Official gazette / government order / cabinet minutes
- [ ] Tier 2 — PTI/ANI wire, The Hindu, Indian Express, Mathrubhumi, Malayala Manorama
- [ ] Tier 3 — Other credible regional press

<!-- Optional but encouraged. We will add it if you can't. -->
